modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Class is missing from D2L platform.

full_description_text: I can't find my class in D2L anymore. It just disappeared and I don't know why. I was trying to log in and see my course, but it's not there. This is really confusing and frustrating for me.
short_description: Class is missing from D2L platform.
description: I can't find my class in D2L anymore. It just disappeared and I don't know why. I was trying to log in and see my course, but it's not there. This is really confusing and frustrating for me.
